message:
feat(quota_gate): add pre-launch quota gate for pane spawning (ft-2dss0)

New quota_gate module providing pre-launch decision logic that combines:
- Budget alerts from CostTracker (Critical→Block, Warning→Warn)
- Rate limit status from RateLimitTracker (FullyLimited→Block, Partial→Warn)
- Account quota availability (Exhausted→Block, Low→Warn)

Types: QuotaGate, LaunchDecision, LaunchVerdict, QuotaSignals, LaunchWarning
Addresses acceptance criterion: "Quota check on every pane launch"
17 unit tests + 7 proptest invariant suites (100 cases each)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
